Game.Name: Kat's Run - Zen-Nihon K-Car Senshuken (Japan)
Game.plot: Kat's Run is a Racing game, published by Atlus Co., which was released in Japan in 1995.http://www.gamefaqs.com/console/snes/home/571312.htmlCheat: Alternate ColorAt the car selection screen, press the R button to change colors.Cheat: Unlock the secret corridors (Miki and Sayoko) and the cop car:At the "Press Start" screen, hold "(A, B, Y, X)" and press "START".
